questions.question: Design a 2-to-1 multiplexer in Verilog using structural style. Use AND and OR gates. Show the control inputs, data inputs and output.
questions.hint: Use detailed diagrams to explain your design

questions.question: Implement a 1-to-4 demultiplexer in Verilog using structural style. Use AND and OR gates. Identify the control inputs, data inputs and output.
questions.hint: Use truth tables to verify your design

questions.question: Write a Verilog module to generate a 3-to-8 encoder using structural style. Use AND and OR gates. Identify the input and output signals.
questions.hint: Use Karnaugh maps to simplify your design
